## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Change type

<!-- Check one: -->
- [ ] `feature` — new capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug repair
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, CI, dependencies

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #<issue-number> -->

## Affected systems

<!-- Check all that apply: -->
- [ ] MapSystem / MapRenderer
- [ ] WaveSystem / WaveDirector
- [ ] ResourceSystem
- [ ] FactionSystem
- [ ] UiSystem (HUD, ShopView, DebugView)
- [ ] InputSystem
- [ ] EventBus / GameState / selectors
- [ ] Data configs (`src/data/`)
- [ ] CI / GitHub Actions
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? Check all that apply: -->
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Manual verification in browser
- [ ] New/updated tests included

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- If UI changed, include before/after screenshots. Delete section if N/A. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feature/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, `chore/`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional format
- [ ] Docs updated in the same PR (if behavior changed)
- [ ] No unresolved TODOs or FIXMEs
- [ ] ADR created if this introduces a new architectural decision
- [ ] Labels applied (type + scope + priority)
